content_body: You cabin has made all my dreams come true!!! My boyfriend and best friend since middle school, asked me to be his wife! We are so excited and so thankful that we got to make our first memories together here in your beautiful home. The view is absolutely amazing. We really enjoyed sharing this place with each other and family! Thank you again. We will forever cherish the moments spent here. God is so good and His presence is so prevalent here in your home!
title: Proposal at Romantic Cabin
